shuffle_options.A: Send for infectious and inflammatory laboratory workup and start oral prednisone
shuffle_options.C: Check blood pressure and obtain complete blood cell count and metabolic panel
shuffle_options.D: Perform bilateral pars plana vitrectomy with or without scleral buckle for retinal detachment repair
